TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjaialev ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 97 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 94 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Tjaialev hya' ga Ludja. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjaiale* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na tjaiale* ħjaʔ ɣa lu*ja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tjaialev ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 97 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 94 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Tjaialev hya' ga Ludja. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjaiale* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na tjaiale* ħjaʔ ɣa lu*ja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
